reviews.title: Super Fast Shipping!
reviews.author: Jack B.
reviews.text: Everything was well packaged and arrived in perfect condition. Couldn't be happier from start to finish.

reviews.title: Amazing Experience
reviews.author: Tania B.
reviews.text: From initial message to delivery everything was professional and smooth. The team is very knowledgeable — I felt taken care of throughout.

reviews.title: Old Man Emu — Exactly Right
reviews.author: Donna G.
reviews.text: Fast delivery, excellent packaging, and the item was exactly as described. No surprises — just the part I needed when I needed it.

reviews.title: Ordered and Excited
reviews.author: Kevin S.
reviews.text: Samantha was incredibly patient helping me select the exact kit I needed — without pushing unnecessary add-ons. Felt like real, honest advice.

reviews.title: Excellent Site
reviews.author: Jonathan W.
reviews.text: Customer service is excellent and very receptive. Great selection and easy to navigate. Will definitely be ordering again.

reviews.title: Still Waiting…
reviews.author: Brandon M.
reviews.text: Multiple calls since November with no clear answer on my coilovers. Very frustrating — no proper update on a significantly delayed order.

reviews.title: Slightly Disappointed
reviews.author: Mile K.
reviews.text: Box arrived damaged and coils weren't installed despite paying for the service. Customer service was polite but resolution took considerable effort.

reviews.title: Best Suspension E-Shop in the US
reviews.author: Jose Q.
reviews.text: Impressive service — they truly know their products and consistently go above and beyond. Multiple orders, every experience has been great.

reviews.title: Products Arrived as Expected
reviews.author: Oscar V.
reviews.text: Fast shipping and they resolved a billing issue quickly once I reached out. Good communication once the conversation started.

reviews.title: First Time Customer
reviews.author: Daniel S.
reviews.text: Best price I found online. Zero problems with my order. Will definitely be back for future builds.

reviews.title: Killa Service
reviews.author: Chunhang C.
reviews.text: Quick responses during business hours, excellent and courteous service. Clear communication with no surprises throughout.

reviews.title: Not Perfect, But Made It Right
reviews.author: Tommy K.
reviews.text: Received a used shock with missing and incorrect parts. Took over a month to fully resolve, but they did ultimately make it right.

reviews.title: Great Customer Service
reviews.author: Kyle S.
reviews.text: Staff were fast and accurate with delay info. Issues were resolved quickly and professionally — never felt left in the dark.

reviews.title: Assembled Struts — Mostly Good
reviews.author: Brian K.
reviews.text: Struts didn't arrive pre-assembled as requested, but customer service responded immediately and helped sort it out. Good support.

reviews.title: Terrible Experience
reviews.author: Clayton C.
reviews.text: Waited 6 weeks for items listed as in stock. The delay pushed my build project back 3 months. Not for time-sensitive builds.

reviews.title: They Gave Me the Goods!
reviews.author: Derek G.
reviews.text: The team answered every question, gave great build advice, and the result was a 4Runner that rides better than stock. Impressive.

reviews.title: Fast Shipping and Easy Website
reviews.author: Darie I.
reviews.text: Multiple purchases here — always fast shipping and an easy-to-use site. I can rely on Mudify for future parts orders.

reviews.title: Buen Servicio
reviews.author: Franco S.
reviews.text: Excelentes productos, control de calidad, y delivery a tiempo sin ninguna espera. Muy satisfecho con la experiencia completa.

reviews.title: Trouble With Shipping
reviews.author: Kit C.
reviews.text: Received two left control arms instead of one left and one right. Took 9–10 days to resolve. They fixed the error, but the mistake cost time.

reviews.title: Chronic Delays — Unresolved
reviews.author: A Customer
reviews.text: Order placed in March. Repeated delays through April, May, June. Was offered a downgrade or extra payment to source the part. Unacceptable.
